rules.name: valid_billing_interval
rules.description: Enforces billing_interval enum: monthly / quarterly / annual / lifetime. Cross-field: billing_interval='lifetime' requires next_renewal_at = null; other intervals require next_renewal_at set for active memberships.

rules.name: valid_positive_price
rules.description: Non-negative integer. Used on price_cents + price_snapshot_cents + amount_cents.

rules.name: valid_positive_passes_per_period
rules.description: Non-negative integer OR null (null = unlimited). Zero means the plan grants access without pass-per-session accounting.

rules.name: valid_refund_policy
rules.description: Enforces refund_policy enum + consistency with refund_grace_days: 'no_refund' requires refund_grace_days = 0; 'full_within_grace' requires refund_grace_days > 0.

rules.name: valid_effective_range
rules.description: When both plan.effective_from + plan.effective_until are set, from < until. Otherwise either may be null (indefinite start or end).

rules.name: valid_prerequisites_shape
rules.description: JSONB schema check on plan.prerequisites: { requires_athlete_medical_clearance: bool, requires_guardian_verified: bool, requires_minimum_athlete_age: int|null }.

rules.name: valid_addon_config_shape
rules.description: JSONB schema check on plan.addon_config. Cross-field: non-empty addon_config requires `membership_addon_management` entitlement.

rules.name: valid_state_transition
rules.description: Enforces membership state machine: pending → {active, cancelled}; active ⇄ paused; active/paused → cancelled; active/paused → lapsed; active → expired; refunded is a cross-cut from any state (refund module authority). No transitions from terminal states (cancelled/lapsed/expired/refunded).

rules.name: atomic_membership_invoice_creation
rules.description: LOAD-BEARING. Enforces that MembershipCreated fired implies an invoice::Invoice was created in the same DB transaction with total_amount matching membership's price + tax - coupon. Post-hook assertion — reads the invoice by membership_id back-reference; refuses with `MEMBERSHIP_INVOICE_CREATE_FAILED` when missing. Rules out silent invoice-lookup drift.

rules.name: unique_active_membership_per_athlete_per_plan
rules.description: Enforces partial unique index (tenant_id, athlete_id, membership_plan_id) WHERE status IN ('pending', 'active', 'paused'). Refuses with `MEMBERSHIP_DUPLICATE` on collision.
